title: Phase 8: KB agent + index.ts update
description: Write src/mastra/agents/_example.ts (knowledgeBaseAgent) and update index.ts to add vectors config, agent, and scorers. Live smoke test.

title: Phase 7: RAG scorers
description: Write src/mastra/scorers/_example.scorers.ts with faithfulness, answerRelevancy, contextRelevance triplet from @mastra/evals prebuilt.

title: Phase 6: Retrieval tool
description: Write src/mastra/tools/retrieve.ts wrapping createVectorQueryTool. Uses RAG_INDEX_NAME, RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL, RAG_TOP_K from env.

title: Phases 9-13: Eval, Docker, CI, Docs, Verification
description: Remaining phases: eval dataset + runner, Docker verify, CI workflow update, README/AGENTS.md/prompts docs, final verification against 05-verification.md.
close_reason: All 13 phases complete. Phase 13 verification passed with one documented fix: AIMock removed from CI eval (embedding calls can't be mocked without dimension-correct vector fixtures).
